nasb.text: Then the two choirs took their stand in the house of God. So did I and half of the officials with me;

esv.text: So both choirs of those who gave thanks stood in the house of God, and I and half of the officials with me;

cnv.text: 於是這兩隊頌讚的人就站在　神的殿裡，我和一半的官長也站在那裡；

ccb.text: 这两队称颂的歌乐手站在上帝的殿里，我和半数的首领也站在那里，
